sections.description: Auto-generate barcodes, design label templates, manage a print queue, and add products in seconds with the mobile Quick Add workflow.
sections.changelog:
1.2.1

  • Maintenance release.

1.2.0

  • New: Batch Create page — scaffold N draft products from a price template in one click.
  • New: Scan-to-Publish flow — scanning a draft product barcode shows a Complete & Publish card.

1.1.5

  • Fixed: Quick Add barcode lookup broken in three ways.

1.1.4

  • Fixed: Quick Add product image blank due to photo upload race condition.

1.1.3

  • Maintenance release.

1.1.2

  • Fixed: Fatal 500 error on Label Templates page.

1.1.1

  • Fixed: Label Templates JS crash and media picker error.

1.1.0

  • New: Inventory management module.

1.0.1

  • Fixed barcode live preview. Added A4 paper size support.

1.0.0

  • Initial release.
